message.content: {"items":[{"title":"South Carolina Loyalists Petition (1778)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13585","justification":"This historical dataset covers a 1778 petition of South Carolina Loyalists, directly relevant to South Carolina in the 1770s within a historical context."},{"title":"South Carolina: The Path to the American Revolution, 1763–1776","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13586","justification":"Focuses on South Carolina in the period 1763–1776, addressing historical developments leading up to the American Revolution, matching the 1760s–1770s range."},{"title":"Massachusetts Tax Valuation List of 1771","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13582","justification":"Provides detailed historical data on Massachusetts in 1771, fitting the requested 1770s interval and historical focus."},{"title":"Voting in Massachusetts Towns During the American Revolution, 1773–1783","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13583","justification":"Contains historical voting data from Massachusetts towns between 1773 and 1783, directly within the requested 1770s–1780s frame."},{"title":"Massachusetts Historical Election Data, 1780–1790","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13584","justification":"Historical election data for Massachusetts covering 1780–1790, aligning with the 1780s and 1790s and the historical theme."},{"title":"Southern Colonies in the American Revolution: Selected Documents, 1764–1789","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13587","justification":"Includes documents from South Carolina among other southern colonies between 1764 and 1789, covering much of the 1760s–1780s with relevant historical material."},{"title":"Colonial American Legislatures: Roll Call Voting Records, 1740–1775","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13588","justification":"Offers colonial legislative voting records, likely including Massachusetts and possibly South Carolina, across 1740–1775, matching the 1740s–1770s historical scope."},{"title":"Colonial American Town Records: New England, 1730–1780","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13589","justification":"Covers town records from New England, which includes Massachusetts, spanning 1730–1780 and therefore overlapping the 1730s–1780s period."},{"title":"Colonial American Economic Life: Price and Wage Series, 1730–1800","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13590","justification":"Historical economic dataset for colonial America (including Massachusetts and South Carolina) from 1730–1800, matching the requested decades."},{"title":"Colonial American Military Muster Rolls, 1754–1783","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13591","justification":"Contains historical military records from the French and Indian War through the American Revolution, including units from Massachusetts and South Carolina in the 1750s–1780s."}]}
